title: dactylorhiza × formosa
intro: Dactylorhiza × formosa, also known as the Formosa Spotted Orchid or the hybrid of Dactylorhiza maculata and Dactylorhiza fuchsii, is a rare orchid species found in Ireland and Scotland. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the cardiovascular system and act as a vasodilator. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × formosa include improving circulation, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of angina and other cardiovascular conditions. Dactylorhiza × formosa is typically used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
